name: French Cream Almondine
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the milk chocolate to a temperature of 110 degrees F (43 degrees C). Scald the milk.
2. Add the hot milk and marshmallow creme to the melted chocolate. Beat until smooth.
3. Stir in 1 1/2 cups of chopped toasted almonds.
4. Spread the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
5. Sprinkle the remaining chopped almonds over the top, pressing them down gently.
6. Allow the mixture to set completely.
7. Once set, cut into squares.
Makes about 49 pieces.
